framework.name: Agent Identity = OAuth 2.0 + Spending Limits + Consent Verification
framework.description: UCP's agent identity model is traditional OAuth 2.0 user authorization with spending limits enforced at the payment processing layer. This is RBAC with rate limits — exactly the centralized registry model, not cryptographic delegation.
framework.raw_quote: OAuth 2.0 tokens on user authorization, spending limits in your payment processing, integration with AP2's consent verification.

source.title: Google's Universal Commerce Protocol: What It Means for Payment ...
